notes: v0.6.3 — fix Hidden Line capture going entirely magenta. v0.6.0 wrapped EVERY write_image in with_marker_background (the magenta SkyColor/GroundColor/BackgroundColor toggle that lets the AI see window openings). For Shaded that's correct: faces are the materials' colours, bg shows only through openings → magenta = window. But for Hidden Line, SU paints faces with default white face-front and the magenta bg leaked through everywhere there was no facet to occlude (interior shots → entire frame magenta). Now magenta is wrapped ONLY around the Shaded capture; Hidden Line gets clean default white bg + with_clean_edges (Profiles/Jitter/etc off), which is the right input for geometry-only conditioning. v0.6.2's segmentation-palette toggle still works on top of this — it only re-paints during the Shaded capture.
